summary: Full testing of all 9 new modules + AI chat execute-action + privacy. 11/12 backend tests passed (1 skipped). All 9 new pages load correctly. Privacy redirect works. Retenciones calculates ReteFuente correctly ($40,000 on $1M). Nomina shows SMLMV 2025 $1,423,500 with correct totals. Presupuesto page UI works. Inventario Auteco shows stats cards with 0 items and 'Importar Factura PDF' button. Sidebar shows all 6 sections.

minor.issue: Response returns {message: 'N ítems guardados'} not {saved: N}. Frontend integration should verify it matches - appears consistent with frontend usage.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay (emergent-badge element) blocks chat toggle button click in automated testing. Button is correctly positioned bottom-right but badge intercepts pointer events. Real users can interact by clicking above the badge area.
ui_bugs.priority: LOW - Environment badge issue only affects automated testing

issues: Employee table uses date picker for period (2026-03 with native picker). Acceptable since it's a month/year picker not a full calendar.

critical_code_review_comments: DELETE /api/presupuesto/{item_id} uses the generated 'id' field but since upsert generates a new UUID each time an item is saved, deleting by ID may not work correctly. The id generated in save is not deterministic - consider using a stable ID from the client or changing the upsert key.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all 9 new pages load + sidebar navigation + privacy redirects pass)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Ventas motos presupuesto item (cleaned up by test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 new modules work. Privacy redirects work. AI chat execute-action endpoint uses action names: crear_factura_venta, registrar_factura_compra, crear_causacion, registrar_pago, crear_contacto. Retenciones calculator verified: $1M servicios generales = $40,000 ReteFuente (4%). Nomina shows SMLMV $1,423,500. Presupuesto POST schema: {mes: string, ano: int, categoria: string, concepto: string, valor_presupuestado: float}. Emergent badge blocks automated chat widget testing but it's env-level issue. Alegra API is MOCKED in demo mode.
mocked_apis: Alegra ERP (/api/alegra/*) is MOCKED via mock_data.py in demo mode
